_meta.model: Model 2 - Load-capacity dynamical system: weaning as a saddle-node bifurcation
_meta.state: C(t) = sustainable inspiratory muscle capacity [cmH2O]; timescale hours-days
_meta.ode: dC/dt = alpha*(C_max - C) - beta*C*g(L/C),  g(u) = 1/(1+exp(-s*(u - u_crit)))
_meta.calibration_status: See docs/CALIBRATION.md section 3. u_crit and capacity_grid were CORRECTED against the build spec; alpha is semi-constrained; beta and s have no published value.

alpha.source: Laghi 1995 PMID 7592215 - 24h recovery curve. SEMI-CONSTRAINED: recovery is biphasic, model forces single exponential. See CALIBRATION.md 3.

beta.source: TODO-verify - NO published fatigue rate constant exists. Inferred from ~35% capacity fall over an assumed 15-45 min Tlim.

s.source: TODO-verify - not addressed in literature. Constrained only indirectly by Tlim > 45 min at u ~ u_crit.

u_crit.source: Roussos & Macklem 1977 PMID 893274 - Pdicrit ~0.4 measured as PURE Pdi/Pdimax, no duty-cycle term. CORRECTS the spec's 0.15, which was a TTdi value and is NOT the same quantity. See CALIBRATION.md 1.1.

capacity_grid.source: Vassilakopoulos 1998 PMID 9700110 - MIP 42.3+-12.7 (weaning failure) vs 53.8+-15.1 (success). CORRECTS the spec's [40..80], which omitted the 20-40 band where weaning failure actually lives and included 80, which the weaning population does not reach.

load_from_model1._use_note: 'mean' = mean INSPIRATORY P_mus, which pairs with u_crit=0.4 (Roussos & Macklem, a pure pressure ratio). 'duty_weighted' reproduces the tension-time index and MUST be paired with u_crit=0.15 (Bellemare & Grassino) instead. 'peak' has NO published threshold and is provided for exploration only. lc.utilisation enforces the pairing.

vassilakopoulos1998.source: Vassilakopoulos 1998 PMID 9700110. Pi values DERIVED as (Pi/Pimax)*Pimax. See CALIBRATION.md 3.1.
